content: If we expand the Merriam-Webster definition of an agent as "any entity that exerts power to produce an effect" to include biological pathogenic agents, we can hypothesize that pathogenic biological agents operate via a primitive analog of the 2025 ICM curiosity mechanism. Like ICM-driven autonomous agents, pathogens gain an intrinsic "reward" for exploring new, unoccupied host niches rather than just optimizing for existing, familiar infection sites.
